allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/orgs/suitenumerique/repos?per_page=100&sort=updated" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; repos=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], '-', r.get\('description',''\)\) for r in repos]" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/suitenumerique/meet/contents/" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['type'], i['name']\) for i in items]" 2>/dev/null)
